reason: Backend checklist and KGTraceVis invariants for adapter implementation.
Dataset adapters belong under src/kgtracevis/adapters and reusable logic must stay out of scripts.
Adapters should rely on deterministic validation and avoid silent malformed evidence.
Defines pytest, ruff, mypy, and example-run quality gates.
Adapters connect raw records to schema, pipeline, metrics, and future scripts.
